title: Enamel
description: Hollow Knight/Paper Mario style Charm system, It's pin themed!
body:
# I love pins, so I made a mod about 'em!
[![Modfest 26.1 Badge](https://badger-api-staging.worldwidepixel.ca/cozy?gradientStart=a41c5f&gradientEnd=580c36&lineOne=Made%20for&lineTwo=ModFest%2026&colourOne=FFFFFF&colourTwo=fa96c8&iconUrl=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ModFest/art/5959f93d710deccb28fa8f3d805206bf0ad27a13/icon/svg/26/transparent.svg)](https://modfest.net/26)\
Enamel adds pins! simple, decently powerful trinkets (using trinkets API), however they dont cost a slot! Instead, it uses a new* pin point system, each pin costing some amount to equip, if you've equipped over the amount of points you have... well you can't equip more.\
...I've also heard about some kind of "overpincumberance**" that makes you slow and hurt more... but i'd not risk it.\
<small>* New to minecraft. This mod is inspired by the likes of Hollowknight and Paper Mario.\
** Equiping over your point count, in general.</small>
